blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light rain, highs of 41°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
